files.classification_reason: Generated CEO read model snapshot synthesized from runtime truth sources and supporting snapshots; it is not a source-of-truth file.
Append-style operator action event log capturing runtime execution outcomes; committing it as source would blur live history with governed truth.
Append-only outcome log of execution and learning events; expected to churn during runtime and should remain out of source commits unless explicitly governed.
Latest agent loop runtime output; this is execution telemetry, not governed truth.
Canonical primary-action read snapshot generated from runtime truth; it is designed to be rebuilt, not hand-governed.

expected_churn: primary_action snapshot refreshes after command-center execution
CEO truth snapshot refreshes after source snapshots change
event logs append during operator actions and outcome logging
agent loop output refreshes after each execution cycle
commit_guidance.governance_effect: Committing these runtime artifacts would preserve transient execution state in version control and reduce the clarity of the source-of-truth boundary.
